description: Lane and gate policy for Product Mission Control autonomous approvals.

rules.reason: Production is a permanent human approval boundary.
Approved feature plans may open issue drafts automatically.
Approved feature issue plans may prepare draft PR payloads automatically.
Approved growth plans may open issue drafts automatically.
Approved growth issue plans may prepare draft PR payloads automatically.
Maintenance fixes may prepare draft PR payloads after queue intake.
MLOps improvements may prepare draft PR payloads after plan approval.
Approved ops plans may open follow-up issue drafts automatically.
